title: Simply Scary
body:
## Simply Scary: A Minecraft Horror Experience 

*Simply Scary* plunges you into a Minecraft world utterly transformed into a realm of pervasive dread. This isn't just a modpack; it's an experience designed to make you question every shadow, every sound, and every decision.

**Face Unspeakable Horrors:**

No longer is Minecraft a safe haven. *Simply Scary* introduces a terrifying trio of new entities, each more unsettling than the last:

**The Cartoon Dweller:** A twisted, animated nightmare that lurks in the deepest caves, its unsettling movements and distorted form promising a gruesome end.

![cartoon cat](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/v_mXfZk8_ZQ/maxresdefault.jpg)

**The Man from the Fog:** A shadowy figure that emerges from the thickest mists, his presence bringing an icy chill and a sense of inescapable pursuit.

![Man from the fog](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/GhwBL1Ye6zM/maxresdefault.jpg)

**The Goatman:** A primal, horned abomination that stalks the wilderness, its guttural cries and relentless aggression marking it as a truly formidable foe.

![Goatman](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/wuBP53MgqPo/hq720.jpg)

**Explore a World of Despair:**

Your journey through *Simply Scary* will be marked by an abundance of new, haunting structures. From decrepit, overgrown ruins to abandoned, echoing institutions, every new discovery promises a fresh wave of anxiety and potential danger. These meticulously crafted environments aren't just decorative; they're integral to the terror, often holding secrets, traps, or even worse... the monsters themselves.

![Yungs strcutures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05f5bea8974f486153fc2097d1d7e5a95fe4cb5c.jpeg)

**Immerse Yourself in Darkness:**

Experience true atmospheric horror with a carefully selected suite of shaders. These visual enhancements transform the familiar Minecraft landscape into a bleak, oppressive canvas, emphasizing the gloom, amplifying the shadows, and making every flicker of light a precious commodity. The world will feel darker, more foreboding, and infinitely more dangerous.

**Can you survive a world where every corner holds a new nightmare? Download Simply Scary and find out.**

Attributions:

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cctvcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cctvcraft)
